3080250.name: Lots of Cats in Every Moment: The Whereabouts of the Photo
3080250.description:
“Lots of Cats in Every Moment: The Whereabouts of the Photo” is an expansion pack that contains the latter part of the story from the base game.

The kitten runs away with the photo…. Where did they hide it? Find the cats hidden in the beautiful and diverse hand-drawn landscapes and listen to their story, meow!

Find Over 1800 Cats and Special Items!

  • Part 1 (free): 5+1 main landscapes, 5 interactable comic strips, 650+ cats, 250 items

  • Part 2 (DLC): 5+1 main landscapes, 5 interactable comic strips, 650+ cats, 250 items

Main Features

  • All comic strips and main landscapes are connected through story progression.

  • Hints can be used once per minute.

  • No penalty for clicking on a spot without a cat. Search freely.

  • Has an original soundtrack, with unique tracks featured in each episode. Another BGM set is also available, so you can choose the one that you like best.

  • Every illustration is 100% hand-drawn and crafted with love.
3080250.supported_languages: 英语, 韩语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
